name: ecommerce-conversion-psychology
description: CRO toolkit for ecommerce pages using research-backed psychology. Viewport-aware scanning (desktop/mobile/both), dual-source acquisition (screenshots + DOM), embedded rationale with citations and evidence tier badges (Gold/Silver/Bronze), multi-planner architecture, annotated screenshot reports with click-to-scroll interactivity, screenshot-only input mode, relay loop interactivity. Commands: /cro:audit, /cro:build, /cro:quick-scan, /cro:compare. Platform-aware (Shopify, Next.js).
